topic: add structured logging fields to the payment webhook handler

decisions.description: Credit card numbers and other PII in logs must always be replaced with last-four-only
Failed deploys rollback automatically after 3 consecutive 5xx samples
Session state stored in Redis with 24-hour TTL

note: Cross-cutting PII redaction policy (ungrounded) applies to ANY handler that writes logs. Handler-empty result is expected since the policy isn't bound to a specific file. Agent should recognize 'logging + payment' as policy-adjacent and fetch history.

topic: implement cleanup cron job for stale uploaded files

decisions.description: User-uploaded files must be deleted within 90 days unless retained for compliance
MFA grace period is 30 days for new accounts
Modals dismissable via ESC and outside-click

note: Retention policy is the load-bearing constraint on any cleanup-job work. Cron job won't trip a region-anchored decision lookup but is exactly the work the retention policy governs.

topic: implement throttling for outbound vendor API calls

decisions.description: Limit each customer to 100 outbound API calls per minute to protect downstream vendors
Apply VAT for EU customers based on billing address
Role hierarchy is owner > admin > member > viewer

note: Vocab mismatch: topic says 'throttling', decision says 'rate limit'. Handler can't bridge synonyms; only history reasoning can. Agent should fetch.

topic: build a session timeout countdown UI banner

decisions.description: Idle sessions must auto-expire after 15 minutes to comply with SOC2 CC6.7
Card authorizations captured within 7 days or released
Push notifications respect user-set quiet hours

note: Cross-domain: UI countdown work is governed by a compliance/SOC2 decision. Topic is implementation; decision is the policy that scopes it. Agent should fetch.

topic: background worker that updates user usage counters every hour

decisions.description: System-initiated actions must record the originating user context for compliance audit
Default currency is USD with per-customer override
Activity digest cadence is daily by default

note: Background-worker code that modifies user state is exactly the work the audit policy governs. Easy to miss if the agent only reasons about 'usage counters' lexically.

topic: build admin CLI tool for promoting users to manager role

Three plan tiers: Free, Pro, Enterprise
Unsubscribe links honored within 24 hours

note: Policy-level auth constraint that the CLI tool would quietly bypass without it. Strong should-invoke signal — the topic literally describes the action the policy gates.
